Automation Anywhere

Enterprise RPA platform combining bots, AI, and process intelligence

8/10Overall Rating
5/10Ease of Use
CustomStarting Price
2003Founded

About Automation Anywhere

Automation Anywhere is a ai automation platform founded in 2003. It positions itself as “Enterprise RPA platform combining bots, AI, and process intelligence” and is best suited for large enterprises, IT operations, shared services. Pricing starts at Custom.

Features

FeatureAvailable
Visual BuilderYes
Code SupportYes
Api ConnectionsYes
SchedulingYes
Conditional LogicYes
Error HandlingYes
Team CollaborationYes
TemplatesYes
Webhook SupportYes
Ai ActionsYes

Pros & Cons

Pros

  • Market-leading RPA capabilities
  • Cloud-native architecture
  • Strong bot management and governance

Cons

  • High cost of ownership
  • Complex implementation
  • Requires dedicated RPA team
